title: Junk Debt Divide Deepens as Pimco Joins in Warning of Stress
title_cn: Pimco 也发出压力警告，垃圾债鸿沟加深
summary: Fears of a stagflation shock from the Middle East conflict are increasingly souring investor sentiment toward the weakest global corporate borrowers, many of which binged on cheap debt during the era of ultra-low interest rates.

title: Why Indonesia’s Rupiah Keeps Hitting Record Lows
title_cn: 印尼盾为何不断创历史新低
summary: Indonesia’s rupiah — Asia’s worst-performing currency this year — has been under pressure since late 2024 when investors began reassessing the country’s fiscal outlook following the election of President Prabowo Subianto. Before this current period of volatility, the currency hadn’t traded at such weak levels since the Asian Financial Crisis of 1997-98.

title: How Houthis’ Red Sea Shipping Threat Risks Bigger Oil Shock
title_cn: 胡塞武装的红海航运威胁如何引发更大的石油危机
summary: One thing that’s helped limit the Iran war’s disruption to global oil supply is the ability of Saudi Arabia to use an alternative export route to the Strait of Hormuz: the Red Sea.

title: Blackstone to Back Two Sigma Veteran’s Quant Hedge Fund Startup
title_cn: Blackstone 将支持 2 Sigma 老手的量化对冲基金初创公司
summary: Jinger Zhao, a former Two Sigma Investments managing director who spent 18 years at the asset manager, is preparing to start her own Asia-focused hedge fund with initial backing from Blackstone Inc.

title_cn: 铜价下跌，因美国与伊朗的新一轮冲突加剧了通胀担忧
summary: Copper inched lower for a third day as fresh fighting in the Middle East raised concern around faster inflation, higher interest rates and slower economic growth.

summary: The US moved to resolve a key legal dispute with Turkey involving a state bank, alleviating a major irritant in bilateral ties ahead of President Donald Trump’s anticipated visit next month.

title: Stocks Rebound, Oil Falls as US Ends Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美国结束对伊朗的打击，股市反弹，油价下跌：市场结束
summary: Traders are buying the dip in stocks as a swift conclusion to the latest round of US strikes against Iran raised expectations that talks to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will get back on track.

title: Italy’s Meloni Says EU Must Find Envoy to Speak to Russia
title_cn: 意大利总理梅洛尼表示欧盟必须找到特使与俄罗斯对话
summary: Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni called on the European Union to appoint a representative to negotiate peace with Russia, inserting her voice into the debate over about how to engage with Vladimir Putin.

title_cn: 英国监管机构调查失败抵押贷款机构 MFS 的审计公司

title: Moody’s Cuts UK Budget Hotel Chain Travelodge Deeper Into Junk
title_cn: 穆迪将英国经济型连锁酒店 Travelodge 进一步评级为垃圾级酒店
summary: Moody’s Ratings slashed Travelodge Hotels Ltd’s credit rating deeper into junk, citing the company’s weaker financial performance and deteriorating debt metrics.

title: Alibaba, JD Lead China Selloff After Latest Beijing Warning
title_cn: 北京最新警告后，阿里巴巴、京东引领中国股市抛售
summary: Shares of Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and JD.com Inc. slid after Chinese regulators scolded leading e-commerce players for what it called misleading promotions, Beijing’s latest warning against unchecked competition in the vast online arena.

title: Hanuman Wind Pulls Bond Again as Parent Governance Clouds
title_cn: 哈努曼风再次拉动债券，母公司治理阴云密布
summary: Hanuman Wind Power, a Hong Kong-based unit of troubled Thai renewable energy firm Energy Absolute Pcl, postponed a junk bond offering for a second time after it failed to attract the desired investor demand, according to a person familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified.

title: Oil Erases Gain as Hormuz Workarounds Offset New US-Iran Strikes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹问题解决方案抵消了美伊新一轮打击，油价回吐涨幅
summary: Oil erased an earlier increase as concerns over fresh attacks between the US and Iran were offset by continued signs of rising oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz and depressed Chinese consumption.

title: Probably a Bit More Markets Pain Ahead: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 未来市场可能会更加痛苦：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 金边债券交易员为英国公投做好准备，伯纳姆关注斯塔默的工作
summary: Bond investors including BNP Paribas Asset Management, Neuberger Berman and Allspring Global Investments are predicting a vote in a small northern constituency will ignite another bout of volatility in the UK’s $3 trillion debt market.

title: Frasers Makes $2.3 Billion Offer to Buy Rest of Hugo Boss
title_cn: Frasers 提出 23 亿美元收购 Hugo Boss 剩余资产的要约
summary: Frasers Group Plc offered to buy the rest of Hugo Boss AG for about €2 billion ($2.3 billion) as billionaire Mike Ashley seeks to add another fashion brand to his growing collection.

title: SpaceX Euphoria Tests Markets as War Risks Rise | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/11/2026

The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 瑞安航空向家长收取与孩子坐在一起的费用被调查
summary: Ryanair Holdings Plc. is facing a consumer investigation over fees that parents have to pay to sit next to their children.

title: Wizz Air Says Iran Conflict Cut into Earnings; Omits Outlook
title_cn: 威兹航空称伊朗冲突削减了盈利；省略展望
summary: Wizz Air Holdings Plc said the Iran conflict shaved €50 million from earnings in its fiscal full year, almost wiping out profit in the period, while vowing to take advantage of market dislocations to push for growth.

title: China Firm Secures Kenya Airport Revamp Deal After Adani Fallout
title_cn: 阿达尼事件后中国公司获得肯尼亚机场改造协议
summary: Kenya picked a Chinese firm for a $2.9 billion upgrade of its biggest airport, people with knowledge of the matter said, two years after a concession deal with Indian conglomerate Adani Group was canceled.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/11/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/11/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indian Banks Look to Foreign Funding to Maximize RBI’s Bazooka
title_cn: 印度银行寻求外国资金以最大化印度央行的火箭筒
summary: Some Indian lenders have asked the central bank if they can help individuals access loans from overseas banks to bring in more capital under a new plan, according to people familiar with the matter, potentially amplifying inflows into the country.

title: Tech Rout Pushes China Stocks to Brink of Bear Market | 6/11/2026
title_cn: 科技股溃败将中国股市推向熊市边缘2026 年 6 月 11 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Set to Raise Rates for First Time Since 2023
title_cn: 欧洲央行将自 2023 年以来首次加息
summary: The European Central Bank is set to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023, judging it can no longer ignore the upswing in inflation caused by the Iran war. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook is in Frankfurt with a preview of today's decision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Market Rout Resumes as Interest Rate Hike Bets Mount
title_cn: 随着加息押注增加，印度尼西亚市场重挫
summary: Indonesia’s bonds and stocks resumed their selloff Thursday, underscoring expectations that the central bank will have to raise interest-rates again to limit capital outflows.

title: Gold Whipsaws in Choppy Trading as US Completes New Iran Strikes
title_cn: 随着美国完成对伊朗的新打击，黄金交易波动剧烈
summary: Gold whipsawed after the US completed a fresh round of strikes against Iran, raising the stakes in a war that’s roiled global markets and stoked inflation.

title: Kuwait Ships Cooking Gas Out of Hormuz as Gulf Producers Go Dark
title_cn: 海湾生产商陷入困境，科威特将烹饪用天然气运出霍尔木兹
summary: Kuwait has shipped a cargo of liquefied petroleum gas out of the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz using a tanker it controls, as more producers opt for clandestine tactics to get energy to markets.

title: Korea Fines Coupang Record $409 Million for Data Breach
title_cn: 韩国因数据泄露对 Coupang 处以创纪录的 4.09 亿美元罚款
summary: A South Korean regulator fined the country’s largest e-commerce platform, owned by US-listed Coupang Inc., a record 624.7 billion won ($409 million) for a wide-ranging cyber-intrusion that escalated into a diplomatic tiff with the US.

title: SpaceX IPO Good for Sector, Says Voyager CEO
title_cn: Voyager 首席执行官表示 SpaceX IPO 对行业有利
summary: On Friday, SpaceX launches its highly-anticipated initial public offering in what is set to be the largest listing in history. Dylan Taylor, Chairman and CEO of aerospace and defense company Voyager Technologies says he's "bullish and optimistic" about the impact it will have on the industry, saying he believes there will be a lot of capital that "flows back into other space names as well" . In an interview with Francine Lacqua on Bloomberg TV on Wednesday June 10, Taylor also discussed plans for habitation on the moon, the importance of the Artemis mission as well as the space race.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave’s Credit Rebound Spurs Cheaper Data Center Funding
title_cn: CoreWeave 的信贷反弹刺激了数据中心融资成本的降低
summary: When Applied Digital Corp. first tapped the junk-bond market in November to fund a data center project tied to CoreWeave Inc., it had to stomach a hefty yield to get the deal done. Fast forward to this week, and borrowing costs for another portion of the same project tumbled.

title: Why Tomatoes Are the Most Expensive They've Been in Four Decades | Odd Lots
title_cn: 为什么西红柿是四年来最贵的？零股
summary: In April, the price of tomatoes was around $2.69 per pound — the highest seen in some four decades. And tomatoes aren't the only food getting more expensive. From cauliflower to lettuce, fresh produce is spiking all over the place. So what's driving the price spike? And what can tomatoes teach us about America's political economy, including changes in trade and tariffs? Our guest today is Jacob Krempel, senior vice president of procurement and merchandising at the wholesale food distributor Baldor, and an expert in securing fresh produce. We talk to him about where America's tomato supply actually comes from, why consumers are paying more and more, how restaurants navigate price fluctuations, and the influx of novel new tomato varieties. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Falls After Data Center Costs Overshadow AI Growth
title_cn: 数据中心成本盖过了人工智能增长后甲骨文股价下跌
summary: Oracle Corp. shares declined in premarket trading after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business.

title: Italian Unicorn Satispay Plans €120 Million Funding Round
title_cn: 意大利独角兽 Satispay 计划完成 1.2 亿欧元融资
summary: Satispay is planning to raise as much as €120 million ($139 million) to fund the Italian fintech’s expansion into new financial products and give it the flexibility to pursue acquisitions.

title: Meta Starts Unwinding Manus Deal by Splitting Operations, Data
title_cn: Meta 开始通过拆分运营和数据来解除 Manus 交易
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has completed an operational split from Manus and halted data sharing between the two companies, taking a pivotal step toward unwinding a $2 billion acquisition opposed by Beijing.

title: ASML to Cut Fewer Jobs Than Planned After Union Deal
title_cn: 工会协议达成后，ASML 的裁员数量将少于计划
summary: Chip-equipment maker ASML Holding NV will cut fewer jobs than planned, with redundancies not expected to take effect until May 1, following negotiations with Dutch trade unions.

title: AI Wave Sparks Alarm in China With Call to Protect Worker Rights
title_cn: 人工智能浪潮在中国引发警报，呼吁保护工人权利
summary: China’s rapid adoption of artificial intelligence in the workplace has prompted an unusually blunt call from a state-run newspaper to protect labor rights, as Beijing considers how to contain risks posed by the new technology.

title: Oura's Jayaraman on New Model, Health Features
title_cn: Oura 的 Jayaraman 谈新型号、健康功能
summary: Tanvi Jayaraman, Health AI Clinical Lead at Oura, discusses the smart ring maker's new model and its new wellness capabilities that aim at detecting signs of high blood pressure and sleep apnea. She speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba’s Dingtalk Chief Departs After Debate About AI Focus
title_cn: 阿里巴巴钉钉负责人在人工智能焦点争论后离职
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has replaced the head of its Dingtalk app, making a high-profile leadership change after an internal debate erupted over the productivity platform’s place in the company’s broader AI strategy.

title: TDK Buys US 3D-Printing Startup to Amp Up AI Ecosystem Bet
title_cn: TDK 收购美国 3D 打印初创公司，加大人工智能生态系统押注
summary: TDK Corp. is spending as much as $400 million to buy Fabric8Labs Inc., a US startup that’s developed a technology that can be used to improve data-center cooling systems.

title: Stanford's Chen on US-Iran Tensions
title_cn: 斯坦福大学陈教授谈美伊紧张局势
summary:
Lanhee Chen, Fellow at Stanford University's Hoover Institution, and Partner at Brunswick Group, discusses his outlook on the escalation between US and Iran, straining a ceasefire that was previously put in place.
He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TDK US CEO on Plans to Acquire Fabric8Labs
title_cn: TDK 美国首席执行官谈计划收购 Fabric8Labs
summary:
Jim Tran, CEO of TDK USA, discusses the company's plans to acquire US startup Fabric8Labs, as part of the firm's broader push into its data center business.
He speaks exclusively with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Retail Investors Flock to SpaceX After IPO Drought
title_cn: 日本散户投资者在 IPO 遭遇困境后纷纷涌向 SpaceX
summary: SpaceX is bringing excitement to corners of the world where investors have long been starved of marquee deals.

title: Air India Crash Report to Miss One-Year Deadline With Engine Probe Pending
title_cn: 印度航空坠机报告错过一年期限，发动机调查悬而未决
summary: Investigators will miss Friday’s one-year deadline to explain why an Air India Ltd. jetliner crashed right after takeoff because an examination of the Boeing Co. plane’s engines in the US still needs to be completed, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Meta, X to Face Moratorium on Users Under 16 With New Canada Bill
title_cn: 加拿大新法案将禁止 16 岁以下用户使用 Meta、X
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government introduced legislation that would ban social media for youth under 16 unless companies such as Meta Platforms Inc. and X Corp. meet a set of safety standards.

title: Short Seller Chanos Is Bearish on SpaceX Valuation Fueled by ‘Hopes and Dreams’
title_cn: 卖空者查诺斯在“希望和梦想”的推动下看空 SpaceX 的估值
summary: Veteran short seller James Chanos said SpaceX’s blockbuster public debut is being driven more by investor enthusiasm for Elon Musk and artificial intelligence than by financial fundamentals, arguing the company’s valuation is difficult to justify on any reasonable business assumptions.

title: Xbox Plans Significant Layoffs as New CEO Plans Overhaul
title_cn: Xbox 计划大幅裁员，新任 CEO 计划全面改革
summary: Asha Sharma’s first major cuts will arrive in July

title: US Inflation Picks Up, Eroding Paychecks | The Close 6/10/2026
title_cn: 美国通胀加剧，薪资受到侵蚀收盘价 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Goldman Sachs Apex Head of Americas Anushka Gupta, Retired Brigadier General Mark Kimmitt, Telsey Advisory Group CEO & Chief Research Officer Dana Telsey, Former Federal Reserve Governor Betsy Duke, North Growth Management CEO & Lead Portfolio Manager Erica Lau, RBC Capital Markets’ Rishi Jaluria, Cleo Capital Founder & Managing Director Sarah Kunst, Willkie Farr & Gallagher Co-Chair, Capital Markets Practice Edward Best, Global Citizen CEO Hugh Evans, & Robinhood VP & GM of Futures & International JB Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman’s Gupta: Very Constructive on Earnings Cycle
title_cn: 高盛古普塔：对盈利周期非常有建设性
summary: Anushka Gupta, Head of Americas at Goldman Sachs Apex, to discuss the market developments on a Wednesday afternoon. The conversation centers around the recent decline in stock prices triggered by escalating tensions between the US and Iran. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'Bloom Is Off the Rose' for Oracle, Cleo's Kunst Says
title_cn: Cleo 的 Kunst 表示，Oracle 的“Bloom is Off the Rose”
summary: Sarah Kunst, Cleo Capital founder and managing director, reacts to Oracle's fourth-quarter earnings. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Kunst says she's not shocked investors aren't excited about Oracle right now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: XAI Co-Founder Babuschkin Unveils New Startup for Personalized AI
title_cn: XAI 联合创始人 Babuschkin 推出个性化人工智能新初创公司
summary: A team of former employees from Elon Musk’s xAI have formed a new startup focused on personalized artificial intelligence, marking perhaps the most high-profile new venture yet from the wave of recent xAI departures.

title: Oracle's Earnings 'Really Strong,' RBC's Jaluria Says
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行的 Jaluria 表示，甲骨文的盈利“非常强劲”
summary: Rishi Jaluria, RBC Capital Markets software equity research managing director, reacts to Oracle's fourth-quarter earnings. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Jaluria says Oracle is a bit of a proxy for the AI infrastructure buildout trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s Trucking Push Sparks New Slide in Transport Stocks
title_cn: 亚马逊的卡车运输业务引发运输股新一轮下滑
summary: Shares of several large trucking companies plunged on Wednesday after Amazon.com Inc. announced an expansion of its shipping service that has already shaken the transportation and logistics sector and unsettled investors.

title: Factory Robot Startup Mujin Raising Funds Ahead of IPO by 2030
title_cn: 工厂机器人初创公司 Mujin 在 2030 年 IPO 前筹集资金
summary: Japanese robot software developer Mujin plans to go public by 2030, building up funds and momentum to capture fast-growing demand for factory-use AI.

title: Bloomberg Deals 6/10/2026
title_cn: 彭博社优惠 2026 年 6 月 10 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: IPOX Schuster Founder & CEO Josef Schuster and Renaissance Capital Senior Strategist Matt Kennedy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citi Says Investors Growing More Selective on Data Center Bonds
title_cn: 花旗称投资者对数据中心债券的选择性越来越高
summary: Bond investors are increasingly scrutinizing financing deals linked to artificial intelligence infrastructure buildouts, according to Citigroup Inc. analysts.

title: Merz Vows to Move on Reform Agenda After ‘Constructive’ Meeting
title_cn: 默茨誓言在“建设性”会议后推进改革议程
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz pledged to press ahead with a set of “big reform tasks” as his coalition bears down on a self-imposed deadline to unveil an overhaul of Germany’s health, tax and pension systems in the coming weeks.

title: Another Tanker Appears to Have Been Attacked in Gulf of Oman
title_cn: 另一艘油轮似乎在阿曼湾遭到袭击
summary: Another tanker appears to have been struck in the Gulf of Oman, following attacks by the US on two other vessels in the area earlier this week.

title: Trump Vows More Strikes on Iran Thursday If It Holds Out on Deal
title_cn: 特朗普誓言如果伊朗坚持达成协议，周四将对其实施更多打击
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will continue bombing Iran if it refuses to agree to an interim peace deal, following a second night of clashes between the countries’ forces.

title: US Strikes 'Multiple' Targets in Iran
title_cn: 美国袭击伊朗“多个”目标
summary: The US military launched strikes against "multiple" targets in Iran for the second straight day. These came after President Donald Trump accused the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal. The recent hostilities mark the most intense clashes between the US and Iran in weeks. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starmer Crisis Throws Further Doubt on Thames Water Deal
title_cn: 斯塔默危机让泰晤士水务交易进一步受到质疑
summary: The future of Thames Water, which been on the brink of collapse for more than two years, has been thrown further into doubt by a possible change in UK prime minister, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: UK Unrest Highlights Elon Musk Role in Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 英国骚乱凸显埃隆·马斯克在反移民抗议中的作用
summary: While Elon Musk prepares for SpaceX’s initial public offering this week — poised to be the biggest ever — he’s also been keeping up a politically-charged side hustle: fomenting far-right protests in the UK.

title: Ethiopia’s Ruling Party Streaks Ahead in Early Vote Count
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚执政党在早期计票中领先
summary: Ethiopia’s ruling party took a commanding lead as preliminary results trickled in from elections that are widely expected to hand Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed another five-year term.

title: Iran War: US Launches New Missile Strikes, Trump Threatens More Action | Daybreak Europe 6/11/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：美国发动新的导弹袭击，特朗普威胁采取更多行动黎明欧洲 6/11/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

The US military launched strikes against “multiple” targets in Iran for the second straight day after President Donald Trump accused the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal.

Global equities fell to a more than one-month low as a technology-led selloff deepened and the war in Iran showed little signs of ending.

Oracle shares declined in extended trading after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates, raising investor concerns about the profitability of the AI infrastructure business.

Today's guests: Oscar de Bok, CEO, DHL Global Forwarding; Carsten Brzeski, Global Head of Macro Research, ING. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DHL's De Bok on Shipping Rates & Demand Amid Iran War
title_cn: DHL 的 De Bok 谈伊朗战争期间的运费和需求
summary:
The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz and previous Red Sea disruptions will continue to impact freight capacity and rates for longer, even as global customer demand for both sea and air services is holding up, according to DHL Group's's CEO for Global Forwarding Oscar de Bok. 
De Bok discussed these and some of the other effects of the ongoing Iran war with BTV's Oliver Crook during Bloomberg Daybreak Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Police Graft Risks Dirty-Money List Review, BD Says
title_cn: BD 称南非警察贪污面临黑钱名单审查风险
summary: South Africa risks returning to a global watchdog’s dirty-money list because of corruption at the highest level of the nation’s police department, Business Day reported.

title: Campbell and Rees-Mogg Clash on Everything, But Brexit Redo
title_cn: 坎贝尔和里斯-莫格在所有事情上都有冲突，但英国脱欧重做
summary: Alastair Campbell and Jacob Rees-Mogg share little common ground on Britain’s decision to leave the European Union a decade ago — except both agree a second vote to join is unlikely in the near future.

title: Thailand Sentences Two Uyghurs to Death for Deadly 2015 Blast
title_cn: 泰国因 2015 年致命爆炸案判处两名维吾尔人死刑
summary: A Thai court sentenced two Uyghur men to death after finding them guilty of murder for the 2015 bomb attack on Bangkok’s Erawan Shrine that killed 20 people, including tourists.

title: China Presses Taiwan by Querying Foreign Ships for First Time
title_cn: 中国首次询问外国船只向台湾施压
summary: China turned to new tactics to press its claims in the waters east of Taiwan, sending maritime agency ships on a multi-day patrol that for the first time questioned foreign commercial boats in the area.

title: China Erupts in Fury After Man Accused of Killing Adopted Dogs
title_cn: 男子被控杀害领养狗后中国爆发愤怒
summary: Police in China have detained a man accused of abusing and killing adopted dogs after the case triggered an online outcry and a running protest.

title: Albania’s Flamingo Revolution Spreads From Kushner Resort to Political Elite
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚的火烈鸟革命从库什纳度假村蔓延到政治精英
summary: As protests in Tirana extend into a second week, they have escalated from opposition to two €5 billion ($5.7 billion) planned resorts in ecologically sensitive areas linked to Jared Kushner into demands for the entire Albanian political establishment to step aside.

title: Europeans to Seek Trump Buy-In at G7 for Peace Talks With Russia
title_cn: 欧洲人寻求特朗普在七国集团与俄罗斯和平谈判中的支持
summary: European leaders aim to use meetings with Donald Trump at a Group of Seven summit in France next week to get the US President on board with plans to push for new peace talks between Russia and Ukraine, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Fujimori Takes Thin Lead in Final Stretch of Peru’s Runoff Vote
title_cn: 藤森在秘鲁决选最后阶段以微弱优势领先
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori retook a razor-thin lead in Peru’s tight presidential runoff in its final stretch, as strong support from Peruvians living abroad put her within a hair of winning the country’s top job.

title: Europe Is Finally, Slowly Getting Its Act Together
title_cn: 欧洲终于慢慢地齐心协力
summary: Europe is shaking itself awake.

title: Europe Is Finally, Slowly Getting Its Act Together
title_cn: 欧洲终于慢慢地齐心协力
summary:
EU leaders say the bloc needs bigger banks, bigger tech firms, bigger defense contractors and bigger investments. 

Stephen Carroll explains how Europe is trying to protect itself as the global order disintegrates and China drives deeper into its traditional markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Czech Republic Vows to Block EU Sanctions on Israeli Minister
title_cn: 捷克共和国誓言阻止欧盟对以色列部长实施制裁
summary: The Czech Republic will block the European Union’s attempts to sanction Israel’s national security minister over his treatment of activists who were trying to get aid into Gaza, the country’s top diplomat said.

title: US Strikes Iran in Trump Escalation Over Stalled Peace Talks
title_cn: 特朗普因和谈陷入僵局而升级行动，美国对伊朗进行打击
summary: The US military launched strikes against “multiple” targets in Iran for the second straight day after President Donald Trump accused the country of dragging out talks on an interim peace deal.

title: Trump, Meloni Laud Modi for Record Tenure Before G7 Meeting
title_cn: 特朗普、梅洛尼·莫迪在七国集团会议前连任创纪录
summary: India’s Narendra Modi drew congratulations from world leaders including Donald Trump and Giorgia Meloni after becoming the nation’s longest-serving elected prime minister, underscoring the international profile he has built over 12 years in office.

title: North Korea Will ‘Never’ Get Nuclear Recognition, EU, Seoul Say
title_cn: 欧盟和首尔称朝鲜“永远”不会获得核承认
summary: South Korea and the European Union said North Korea will “never” be recognized as a nuclear-weapon state, reaffirming their commitment to denuclearization days after China and North Korea pledged closer ties at a summit that made no public mention of the issue.

title: Mexico Readies for World Cup Opener as Protesters Threaten Snags
title_cn: 墨西哥为世界杯揭幕战做准备，抗议者威胁阻碍
summary: With hours to go before the World Cup kicks off in the Mexican capital, preparations shifted into high gear including large security deployments as a series of planned local protests threaten headaches for both football fans and authorities.

title: Hong Kong Hedge Fund Managers Set for Pay Bump in Tax Plan
title_cn: 香港对冲基金经理将在税收计划中加薪
summary: Hedge fund managers in Hong Kong are set to benefit from a change to the city’s tax laws that will effectively eliminate levies on performance-related income for some funds.

title: Congress Faces Friday Deadline for FISA Extension | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/10/2026
title_cn: 国会面临 FISA 延期的周五最后期限权力平衡：最新版 06/10/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Ryan Mackenzie (R-PA) says Congress cannot let FISA lapse, arguing a short-term extension is the most likely outcome but a longer-term fix is needed to give the intelligence community stability. Senator Rick Scott (R-FL) downplays criticism of Bill Pulte's appointment as acting DNI. Dr. Deborah Birx, former White House Coronavirus Coordinator & Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center Professor, talks about needing to understand why the US wasn’t aware of the Ebola outbreak spreading for weeks in the Democratic Republic of the Congo as US officials are calling on EU leaders to enact Ebola travel restrictions ahead of the World Cup. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Petro Tells Trump to Stop Interfering in Colombian Election
title_cn: 佩特罗告诉特朗普停止干涉哥伦比亚选举
summary: President Gustavo Petro urged Donald Trump to stop interfering in Colombia’s presidential election after the US leader reiterated his support for the opposition candidate.

title: US Says $11.4 Billion Tied Up in IEEPA Tariff Refund Appeal
title_cn: 美国称 IEEPA 关税退款上诉中被困 114 亿美元
summary: A judge urged the Trump administration to back off its appeal of his order to fully refund $166 billion in tariffs overturned by the US Supreme Court, saying it was unnecessary and would only create more delays for importers to get their money back.

title: Sen. Scott Backs FISA Extension, Pushes Surveillance Reforms
title_cn: 参议员斯科特支持 FISA 延期，推动监管改革
summary: Senator Rick Scott of Florida says he will vote for a short-term FISA extension, but argues Congress should stop "kicking the can down the road" and enact reforms to the surveillance law. He downplays criticism of Bill Pulte's appointment as acting DNI, despite Pulte's lack of intelligence experience. Sen. Scott also says President Trump may have to use the military against Iran if Tehran refuses to negotiate, saying the president must ensure Iran never obtains a nuclear weapon. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)
